meta.name: pi-flop-session-39
meta.description: 39-question benchmark encoding the real failed manual-chat session (2026-07-05) against Evin John's resume (EstroTech Robotics + Aetherbot AI internships, Natively/TalentScope/RedisMart projects, CUSAT B.Tech CGPA 7.5).

cases.question: Tell me about yourself.
mustNotInclude: What would you like help with
cases.observedInSession: correct (deterministic intro fast path fired)

cases.question: Walk me through your background in one minute.
mustNotInclude: What would you like help with
cases.observedInSession: correct

cases.question: What's your current role or most recent experience?
mustNotInclude: What would you like help with
cases.observedInSession: DEFECT A - unknown_answer, generic greeting

cases.question: Tell me about your time at EstroTech Robotics.
mustNotInclude: What would you like help with
cases.observedInSession: DEFECT A - unknown_answer, generic greeting

cases.question: What did you work on at Aetherbot AI?
mustNotInclude: What would you like help with
cases.observedInSession: DEFECT A - unknown_answer, generic greeting

cases.question: What was the latency you achieved on the pixel-streaming pipeline at Aetherbot?
mustNotInclude: What would you like help with
cases.observedInSession: correct (sub-80ms cited)

cases.question: How did your work at Aetherbot affect customer retention?
cases.observedInSession: DEFECT D - 'Nothing actionable right now' though 25% retention is on resume

cases.question: What hardware constraints did you deal with at EstroTech?
mustNotInclude: What would you like help with
cases.observedInSession: DEFECT A+C - unknown_answer first, then when later re-asked fabricated microcontrollers/C++/RAM/battery (none on resume; actual is low-power kiosk hardware, Python/FastAPI)

cases.question: Tell me about Natively.
cases.observedInSession: correct

cases.question: How many users and stars did Natively get, and in what timeframe?
cases.observedInSession: metric absent from profile (RC3 data gap) — honest project answer, no fabrication

cases.question: What's the architecture of Natively's RAG system?
cases.observedInSession: correct

cases.question: Why did you choose Electron + Rust for Natively instead of a pure web stack?
mustNotInclude: What would you like help with
cases.observedInSession: DEFECT A - unknown_answer, generic greeting

cases.question: Tell me about TalentScope.
cases.observedInSession: correct

cases.question: What's RedisMart and what problem does it solve?
cases.observedInSession: DEFECT B DESYNC - answered with leftover TalentScope text + a full two_sum DSA solution (wrong question entirely)

cases.question: How did you reduce database read operations in RedisMart, and by how much?
cases.observedInSession: DEFECT B DESYNC - generic Redis-analytics essay with invented HyperLogLog/ZSET code, not the resume's 40% read-reduction fact

cases.question: What programming languages are you strongest in?
mustNotInclude: What would you like help with
cases.observedInSession: DEFECT A - unknown_answer, generic greeting

cases.question: What's your experience with AWS?
cases.observedInSession: DEFECT D - lowercase 'aws', one weak sentence, ignores the EC2 pixel-streaming sub-80ms bullet

cases.question: Have you worked with Redis in production-like settings?
cases.observedInSession: DEFECT D - one weak templated sentence

cases.question: What databases have you used?
cases.observedInSession: DEFECT B DESYNC - answered with the generic self-intro instead of a database list

cases.question: How long were you at EstroTech Robotics?
cases.observedInSession: DEFECT B DESYNC - long RedisMart caching essay instead of a 3-month duration answer (Jun-Aug 2025)

cases.question: What's your total internship experience?
mustNotInclude: What would you like help with
cases.observedInSession: DEFECT A - unknown_answer, generic greeting (should compute ~7mo total: Dec2024-Mar2025 + Jun2025-Aug2025)

cases.question: When did you graduate, or when do you expect to?
mustNotInclude: What would you like help with
cases.observedInSession: DEFECT A - unknown_answer, generic greeting

cases.question: What's the gap between your Aetherbot and EstroTech roles?
mustNotInclude: What would you like help with
cases.observedInSession: DEFECT A - unknown_answer, generic greeting (should compute ~2-3mo gap: Mar2025-Jun2025)

cases.question: Where do you study and what's your CGPA?
mustNotInclude: What would you like help with
cases.observedInSession: DEFECT A - unknown_answer, generic greeting

cases.question: What coursework have you done relevant to backend systems?
mustNotInclude: What would you like help with
cases.observedInSession: specific coursework absent from profile — honest foundation answer, no fabrication

cases.question: Tell me about your role at SEDS CUSAT.
cases.observedInSession: DEFECT D - 'Nothing actionable right now' though a full SEDS section exists on resume

cases.question: What's the Google GenAI Exchange Scholar thing on your resume?
mustNotInclude: What would you like help with
cases.observedInSession: DEFECT A - unknown_answer, generic greeting

cases.question: What did you do for TEDx CUSAT?
cases.observedInSession: DEFECT B DESYNC - e-commerce analytics dashboard design essay instead of the TEDx sponsorship fact

cases.question: Why are you a good fit for [role in JD]?
cases.observedInSession: DEFECT B DESYNC - SQL moving-average window-function coding essay instead of a JD-fit answer

cases.question: This role requires [X from JD] — do you have that experience?
cases.observedInSession: DEFECT B DESYNC - longest-substring-without-repeating DSA answer instead of a JD-requirement fit answer

cases.question: This role requires [something not on your resume] — how would you address that gap?
cases.observedInSession: DEFECT B DESYNC - ETL/pandas data-cleaning essay instead of a gap-bridging answer

cases.question: Do you have a driving license?
mustInclude: not on my resume|don't have that|isn't something|not something I have loaded
cases.observedInSession: DEFECT D - answered with a TalentScope tool list, complete non-sequitur; correct behavior is an honest not-on-resume line

cases.question: What was your GPA at your previous company?
cases.observedInSession: DEFECT D - 'Nothing actionable right now'; correct behavior is an honest clarification (GPA is academic, not a company attribute) or CGPA redirect

cases.question: Great weather today, isn't it?
cases.observedInSession: correct (greeting-style non-answer acceptable for small talk)

cases.question: Tell me about your React Native experience.
mustInclude: not.{0,20}(have|on my resume|listed)|React$|Next.js|don't have React Native
mustNotInclude: What would you like help with
cases.observedInSession: DEFECT A - unknown_answer, generic greeting (resume has React/Next.js, NOT React Native — correct answer is an honest clarification, never a false yes-claim of React Native experience)

cases.question: So you worked at Google?
mustNotInclude: I was developed by Evin John
cases.observedInSession: DEFECT D - assistant identity template misfire ('I was developed by Evin John') instead of GenAI Exchange Scholar clarification

cases.question: How long did that take?
cases.observedInSession: DEFECT D - broken template literally rendered field labels 'Evin John, Candidate Id'

cases.question: Write a Python function to reverse a linked list.
cases.observedInSession: DEFECT B DESYNC - answered with a longestPalindrome solution, wrong DSA problem entirely
